raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I received a phone call from Premiere, congratulating us on our purchase of our time share, & they are AFFILIATED with XXXX to sell out some of our XXXX points for us & we would receive a check for getting using our XXXX account, if I paid {$2400.00} up front they would design a contract that we get a check back from Premiere Resorts for {$8000.00} within a few months. I asked them several times & repeated myself on the phone conversation, that they are with XXXX, & they continued to say yes. Once they received my payment information, & stayed on the phone with me the entire time they sent the docusign to make sure i signed. After a couple of days went by, my wife & I had to call XXXX, & we asked about their XXXX XXXX program, they stated, they are not part of any such company, we immediately tried calling them back & could not get anyone to return our call. We sent in a fraud request through our XXXX credit card Barclays ) for the amount of {$2400.00}, & received a letter back stating that XXXX XXXX did what they said they would do??? I called the credit card company & asked what was it that we paid {$2400.00} for & they stated our paperwork states for them to advertise our points??? i demanded to speak with someone higher up, & I spoke with XXXX at Barclays who claimed to be the president of Barclays, & he would look into it, I asked the entire time if I needed to get a police report, & everyone I spoke to said no. I do not understand how i was misled into purchasing & I do not feel this situation was even looked into. I'm pretty sure these people are scamming alot of people of of hard earned money. XXXX should be held accountable for misleading & lieing to people.
